name: tsParticles — Interactive Particle Background
description: Floating connected-dot particle system on the hero section. Actively maintained, highly configurable, no build step.
head:
<style>
  #tsparticles {
    position: absolute;
    inset: 0;
    z-index: 0;
    pointer-events: none;
  }
  #hero, .hero { position: relative; }
  #hero > *, .hero > * { position: relative; z-index: 1; }
</style>
body:
<script src="https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/tsparticles@2/tsparticles.bundle.min.js"></script>
<script>
  document.addEventListener('DOMContentLoaded', function () {
    var hero = document.querySelector('#hero, .hero');
    if (!hero) return;
    var container = document.createElement('div');
    container.id = 'tsparticles';
    hero.insertBefore(container, hero.firstChild);
    var primary = getComputedStyle(document.documentElement)
      .getPropertyValue('--primary').trim() || '#5b4dff';
    tsParticles.load('tsparticles', {
      background: { color: { value: 'transparent' } },
      particles: {
        number: { value: 55, density: { enable: true, area: 800 } },
        color: { value: primary },
        links: { enable: true, color: primary, distance: 150, opacity: 0.3, width: 1 },
        move: { enable: true, speed: 1.2 },
        opacity: { value: 0.5 },
        size: { value: { min: 1, max: 3 } }
      },
      interactivity: {
        events: { onHover: { enable: true, mode: 'grab' }, onClick: { enable: true, mode: 'push' } }
      },
      detectRetina: true
    });
  });
</script>
